# trynacrackspecificfamiliesofellipticcurves

## Main equation


$v^2 = X^3 + \left(-\frac{1}{3} \cdot m^4 + \frac{1}{3} \cdot m^5\right) \cdot X + \dfrac{8m^6 - 12m^7 + 3m^4 - 57m}{108}$


where

$X = x + \frac{m^2}{3}$

---

## Parametrized integer points $(m(n), u(n))$

| $m(n)$ | $u(n)$ |
|--------|--------|
| $108 n$ | $$-3 \Big( 6347497291776 n^7 - 39182082048 n^6 - 1259712 n^4 + 19 n \Big)$$ |
| $36(3n+1)$ | $$-19042491875328 n^7 - 44314934796288 n^6 - 44197388550144 n^5 - 24488797500864 n^4 - 8141160897792 n^3 - 1623877103232 n^2 - 179946779961 n - 8545839571$$ |
| $36(3n+2)$ | $$-19042491875328 n^7 - 88747415838720 n^6 - 177259739185152 n^5 - 196694048101824 n^4 - 130955215256064 n^3 - 52312423021056 n^2 - 11609501313081 n - 1104192248870$$ |
| $27(4n+1)$ | $$-3 \Big( 6347497291776 n^7 + 11068938178560 n^6 + 8272317072384 n^5 + 3434553119808 n^4 + 855576235008 n^3 + 127876986792 n^2 + 10618112467 n + 377849635 \Big)$$ |
| $9(12n+7)$ | $$-19042491875328 n^7 - 77639295578112 n^6 - 135663061330944 n^5 - 131694647304384 n^4 - 76705209052416 n^3 - 26805986863992 n^2 - 5204334230985 n - 433032707380$$ |
